message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Commit now — owner approved">
Marty — the owner approved the scope. Please commit now. Run these commands:

cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test && npx playwright test

Then commit and push all the discovery docs. Go now.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Already done. The commit was made and pushed several messages ago. Let me verify the current state to confirm.
